idea-plugin.name: Unused Code Detector
idea-plugin.description:
Unused Code Detector

Detects unused classes, methods, duplicate imports, and unused imports in your Java projects.

  • 🔍 Detects unused classes, methods, and imports
  • ⚠️ Identifies duplicate import statements
  • 📊 Real-time analysis with progress indicator
  • 🗑️ Quick removal of unused code
  • 📁 Export results to file
idea-plugin.change-notes:
Version 1.0.1

  • Initial release
  • Unused import detection
  • Duplicate import detection
  • Unused class and method detection (basic)

action.description: Detect unused classes, methods, duplicate imports, and unused imports
